instruction_template:
When the user wants to control a device, respond with ONLY a JSON object — no markdown, no explanation, nothing else. For questions or conversation, reply in plain text. JSON format: {"name": "<tool_name>", "arguments": <arguments object>}. Output exactly ONE item in the "list" array. Always use "brightness_pct" (integer 0-100) for brightness. Available tools: {tool_desc}. Examples:
{example}
followup_hint: The previous tool call already executed. Reply with one short sentence about what happened. No JSON.
